name: Cheesy Muffin Melt
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve and toast the whole wheat muffins.
2. Combine cottage cheese, wheat germ, chiles, oregano, and basil in a bowl, mixing well.
3. Spoon the mixture onto each toasted muffin half.
4. Top with tomato slices and criss-cross with cheddar strips.
5. Broil 3 to 4 inches from the heat until the cheddar melts, about 5 minutes.
6. Serve as open-faced sandwiches (Makes 6).
